scope.target: Make repository validation checks consistent with the approved canonical contract
scope.dependency_radius: Local compliance checks and generated validation artifacts
constraints: Depends on canonical standards and dependent-context synchronization
Do not encode semantic architecture rules as unscoped regex
Generated output must not be edited without correcting its source
Distinguish domain repository targets from query repository targets
non_goals: No full Roslyn analyzer implementation unless separately approved

inputs.architecture_target: Executable validation that agrees with the approved repository contract
review_findings: Scripts check the old interface name
The forbidden pattern rejects allowed identity methods
Query repositories are included in domain repository checks
Relative base-path logic differs by script location

steps: Identify generator ownership and derived outputs
Narrow textual checks to safe enforceable rules
Assign semantic rules to architecture tests, analyzers, or explicit deferred work
Run syntax and fixture-based positive/negative checks
validation: Forbidden custom query method fixture fails
Query repository fixture is outside the domain repository rule
Source and generated output are synchronized
deferred_items: Roslyn analyzer or architecture-test implementation if not approved in this workflow
